name: public-welfare-npc-batch-upgrade
title: Public-welfare NPC batch visual and role upgrade
description: Upgrade legacy default public-welfare NPCs in batches to reduce visual repetition, preserve style recipes, and keep every shop's multi-role chat experience fresh.
creator: lijin
notes: Completed 2026-04-30: audited public-welfare NPC assets, recorded prompt/style recipes, rebuilt all remaining rejected/pending legacy public-welfare sprite hashes into repo-local project paths, and passed backend/frontend/Trellis validation. Visuals are deterministic project-local PIL/vector-style sprites and should still receive human aesthetic acceptance before commit.

source_session_unfinished_items: old public-welfare NPC visual repetition still needs batch audit and rebuild
no complete legacy NPC style matrix or prioritization table yet
no formal replacement assets generated for old public-welfare NPCs yet
low-level API/package-import enforcement of at-least-one-chat-character remains deferred; UI/default seeds covered
character-asset-prompt-skill and hospital-nurse-npc-asset remain in review pending human acceptance/commit/session record
meta.quality_baseline: pw_hospital_night_care trio: 3 roles, 5 sprites each, role division, non-degraded rules-backend chat
meta.default_style_workflow: $image-style-prompt-extractor first; add missing complete recipes to style-recipes.md
meta.context_validation: passed after replacing legacy .claude context paths with .agents/skills paths
meta.species_diversity_rule: Fantasy/isekai/non-realistic taverns must not accidentally default every NPC to ordinary humans; audit species/body-plan and encode differences in existing character fields/prompts.

species_diversity_verification.runtime_tests: not run; docs/skill/task rule update only

batch_0_audit.summary: Initial baseline: 9 shops / 28 characters audited; 48 pending rejected expression assets still matched rejected hashes before Batch 1/2 rebuild; recommended first shops were third shelf observatory, midnight commission board, community repair.

batch_1_prompt_manifest.note: Prompt-as-Code envelopes and diversity matrix for Third Shelf Observatory, Midnight Commission Board, and Community Repair; superseded by generated asset manifest for actual replacements.

batch_1_copy_sync.note: Encoded distinct alien body-plan cues for all Third Shelf Observatory roles in existing TavernCharacter fields/tags; no schema/image changes.

batch_1_generated_assets.generation_method: Deterministic project-local PIL renderer based on prompt manifest; no external image model used.

batch_2_prompt_manifest.note: Prompt-as-Code envelopes for the final pending rejected-expression cleanup characters.

batch_2_generated_assets.generation_method: Deterministic project-local PIL renderer based on prompt manifest; no external image model used.

final_asset_verification.note: All entries from the rejected public-welfare NPC asset manifest now differ from the rejected hashes in project-local sprite paths.

done: Batch 0 audit completed for all default public-welfare NPCs and assets.
Batch 1 rebuilt 10 characters / 50 sprites across three old public-welfare shops with source, backup, hash, and contact-sheet artifacts.
Batch 2 rebuilt 4 characters / 20 sprites to clear the remaining pending rejected-expression hashes.
Third Shelf Observatory role copy now encodes distinct alien body plans in existing TavernCharacter fields and tags.
All rejected-manifest entries now differ from rejected hashes while keeping 256×256 project-local PNG sprites.
not_done_or_risks: No external image model was used in this completion slice; images are deterministic project-local PIL/vector-style sprites and still benefit from human visual acceptance.
Hospital night-care trio remains untouched as the prior quality baseline.
